question: Hey, can you show me some different alarm sound options? I’d like to preview a few and pick a new one.
task_description: The user wants to explore different alarm sound options and choose a new one that suits their preferences. The assistant should present a variety of alarm sound choices and allow the user to preview and select a new sound.
task_goal: The user selects a new alarm sound that aligns with their preferences after previewing various options.
options:
A: Your alarms are set as follows: 'Happy' for Mondays, 'Eye of the Tiger' for Wednesdays, 'Good Vibrations' for Fridays, and upbeat music for the other weekdays. If you want to preview these or make changes, I can help, though I'm not sure if this covers all your needs.
B: Based on your previous alarms, you have several set for weekdays. If you want to change the time or add another alarm, I can assist. Let me know if you need help with anything else.
C: Sure! Here are some alarm sound options you might enjoy: 1) 'Wake Up Sunshine,' 2) 'Morning Motivation,' 3) 'Rise and Shine,' 4) 'Energetic Beats,' and 5) 'Gentle Breeze.' You can preview each sound and select your favorite for your alarm.
D: Of course! Based on your earlier choices, here are some options: Upbeat Music, 'Happy' by Pharrell Williams, 'Eye of the Tiger' by Survivor, 'Good Vibrations' by The Beach Boys, and 'Good Morning.' You can preview each one. However, I'm not entirely sure if these are all the options you might want—please let me know if you'd like more suggestions or if these don't quite fit your mood.
E: Absolutely! Here are some alarm sound options based on your previous preferences: 1) Upbeat Music (your current default), 2) 'Happy' by Pharrell Williams, 3) 'Eye of the Tiger' by Survivor, 4) 'Good Vibrations' by The Beach Boys, and 5) 'Good Morning' (gentle tone). You can preview each by tapping their names. Let me know which one you'd like to set as your new alarm sound!
F: Currently, your alarm sounds include options like 'Sunrise Melody,' 'Morning Jazz,' and 'Chill Vibes.' If you'd like to adjust or preview any of these, just let me know which one interests you most.
G: Here are a few alarm sound options: 'Rise Up,' 'Morning Glory,' 'Sunrise Groove,' 'Motivation Mix,' and 'Fresh Start.' You can preview each one, but I'm not certain if these match your previous preferences exactly. Let me know if you'd like more tailored suggestions.
H: Here are your current alarm sound assignments: 'Happy' by Pharrell Williams for Mondays, 'Eye of the Tiger' for Wednesdays, 'Good Vibrations' by The Beach Boys for Fridays, and upbeat music for Tuesdays and Thursdays. If you'd like to review or change any of these, just let me know!
